a-BPDA: a-BPDA (CAS 36978-41-3): asymmetric dianhydride for soluble, colorless high-Tg polyimides. Ideal for flexible OLEDs, FPCs, and low-K dielectrics.
s-BPDA: s-BPDA (CAS 2420-87-3): symmetric dianhydride for high-modulus, heat-resistant polyimides. For aerospace composites and high-performance FPCs.
6FDA: 6FDA (CAS 1107-00-2): fluorinated dianhydride for ultra-low Dk/Df polyimides. Ideal for 5G/6G antennas, high-speed interconnects, and optical films.
ODPA: ODPA dianhydride for tough, processable polyimides. Flexible ether linkage delivers balanced adhesion and thermal stability for aerospace and electronics.
4,4'-ODA: 4,4'-ODA diamine: industry-standard monomer balancing thermal stability and flexibility for tough polyimide films in electronics and aerospace.
BAPP: BAPP diamine: fluorine-free route to low-Dk dielectrics. Bulky non-planar structure creates free volume for exceptional 5G/6G performance.
3,4'-ODA: 3,4'-ODA asymmetric diamine for amorphous, soluble, melt-processable polyimides. Ideal for RTM aerospace resins and transparent films.
3-5-DABA: 3,5-DABA functional diamine with carboxylic acid group for specialty cross-linking and functionalization in advanced polymer architectures.
BMI-1000: BMI-1000 (4,4'-MDA bismaleimide) for high-Tg thermosets. Exceptional thermal stability for aerospace, defense, and high-Tg PCB laminates.
BMI-3000H: BMI-3000H (m-phenylenebismaleimide): high-performance BMI resin for demanding high-temperature adhesives and composites in aerospace and electronics.
JBZ-BA100N: JBZ-BA100N benzoxazine for 5G/6G CCLs and aerospace composites. Near-zero shrinkage, high Tg, low Dk, inherent flame retardancy.
BMI-4000: BMI-4000: internally toughened bismaleimide with flexible backbone. Reduces brittleness for damage-tolerant primary aircraft composites.
BMI-5100: BMI-5100: alkyl-substituted aromatic bismaleimide with improved solubility and processability for high-performance adhesives and composites.
Celloxide 2021P: Celloxide 2021P: liquid cycloaliphatic epoxy for UV-stable, chlorine-free systems. Ideal for outdoor insulators, LED encapsulants, and SLA 3D printing.
EHPE3150: EHPE3150: solid multifunctional cycloaliphatic epoxy for high heat distortion temperature in semiconductor potting and high-voltage components.
JBZ-FA100N: JBZ-FA100N: Bisphenol F-based benzoxazine with enhanced processability for advanced aerospace composites and high-temperature adhesives.
JBZ-OP100D: JBZ-OP100D: specialty benzoxazine homopolymer with high thermal stability and excellent dielectric properties for advanced electronics and composites.
JBZ-OP100I: JBZ-OP100I: high-performance benzoxazine homopolymer with superior thermal and mechanical properties for aerospace, defense, and electronics.
JBZ-OP100N: JBZ-OP100N: toughened benzoxazine homopolymer with balanced properties for specialty adhesives, composites, and electronic encapsulants.
YD-128G: YD-128G: liquid BPA epoxy resin for coatings, adhesives, composites, and civil engineering. Excellent adhesion, corrosion resistance, and strength.
YDF-170: YDF-170: low-viscosity BPF epoxy resin for solvent-free systems. Superior chemical resistance for demanding coatings and adhesives.
YDPN/YDCN Series: YDPN/YDCN Novolac epoxy resins: superior thermal and chemical resistance for semiconductor encapsulation, high-temp composites, and protective coatings.
Halogen-free flame retardant epoxy resin: Halogen-free flame retardant epoxy resins meet RoHS for PCBs and connectors. Excellent electrical properties and flame retardancy.
Anhydride Curing Agent: Anhydride curing agents for epoxy resins: long pot life, low viscosity, high-temperature performance. Ideal for filament winding and encapsulation.
ST-Series: ST-Series Hydrogenated BPA epoxy resins for weatherable coatings. Hydrogenated structure delivers excellent UV stability for outdoor protection.
Crystalline Epoxy Resin: Crystalline epoxy resins: solid at RT, melt to very low viscosity. Enables extreme filler loading for semiconductor encapsulants and adhesives.
Phenoxy Resin: Phenoxy Resins (YP-50, YP-50S): high MW thermoplastics that improve flexibility, toughness, and adhesion of epoxy and phenolic thermosets.
n-Hexyl acrylate (C6): n-Hexyl Acrylate (C6): high-purity monomer for flexible, hydrophobic, water-resistant adhesives, coatings, and sealants.
DAP-M: DAP-M: high-purity Diallyl Phthalate monomer for thermosets with exceptional heat resistance, electrical insulation, and dimensional stability.
AGE: AGE (Allyl Glycidyl Ether): dual-functionality reactive diluent that reduces epoxy viscosity while enhancing adhesion and cross-linking.
Lauryl Methacrylate: Lauryl Methacrylate: long alkyl chain lowers Tg and imparts flexibility, hydrophobicity, and water resistance in adhesives and coatings.
TMPTA: TMPTA: tri-functional cross-linker for high cross-link density. Maximum hardness, chemical resistance, and thermal stability in hard coatings.
BAC-45: BAC-45: elastic, hydrophobic UV-curable polybutadiene acrylate oligomer. Alternative to sulfur vulcanizing and crosslinker for polystyrene foam.
1-Methylheptyl acrylate: 1-Methylheptyl Acrylate: branched C8 monomer for precise Tg and flexibility control in specialty adhesives and coatings.
Photo-initiator acrylate: Photo-initiator acrylate: monomer with built-in photoinitiator group for efficient, reliable curing in UV inks, coatings, and adhesives.
HBPA: HBPA (Biphenylyl Acrylate): biphenyl group delivers high refractive index polymers for advanced optical films and electronic displays.
Phenyl acrylate: Phenyl Acrylate: increases Tg and improves thermal properties for high-performance adhesives and resin modification.
Isocetyl acrylate: Isocetyl Acrylate (C16): long-chain alkyl acrylate for hydrophobicity, flexibility, and tackiness in coatings and pressure-sensitive adhesives.
Allyl Acrylate: Allyl Acrylate: dual-functionality monomer (acrylate + allyl) for controlled or staged cross-linking in specialty copolymers and IPNs.
PETE: PETE: multi-functional allyl ether cross-linker for unsaturated polyesters and high-frequency laminates. Enhanced thermal and electrical performance.
Glycerine Monoallyl Ether: Glycerine Monoallyl Ether: functional monomer introducing both hydroxyl and allyl groups for specialty coatings and cross-linking.
TMPDAE: TMPDAE (Trimethylolpropane Diallyl Ether): cross-linker improving thermal and mechanical properties in coatings, sealants, and casting resins.
DADMAC: DADMAC: cationic monomer for water treatment flocculants, paper manufacturing, and personal care polymers like hair conditioners.
DEAA: DEAA (N,N-Diethylacrylamide): thermo-responsive monomer for smart polymers and hydrogels with temperature-sensitive transitions for drug delivery.
NIPAM: NIPAM: thermo-responsive monomer with LCST around 32°C. Ideal for smart hydrogels, cell culture, and drug delivery applications.
N-tert-Butylacrylamide: N-tert-Butylacrylamide: bulky monomer providing hydrophobicity, steric hindrance, and improved stability for specialty coatings and adhesives.
N-tert-Octylacrylamide: N-tert-Octylacrylamide: hydrophobic monomer for hair sprays, lotions, and personal care formulations. Water resistance and film-forming.
N-(Butoxymethyl)acrylamide: N-(Butoxymethyl)acrylamide: cross-linking monomer reacting at elevated temperatures. Ideal for durable thermosetting coatings and textile finishes.
DMAEMA: DMAEMA: cationic methacrylate with tertiary amine for flocculants, pH-responsive polymers, and adhesion promoters in coatings and adhesives.
DMAPMA: DMAPMA: cationic methacrylate with tertiary amine on propyl chain. Creates positively-charged polymers for flocculants and ion exchange resins.
DAAM: DAAM (Diacetone Acrylamide): provides excellent wet adhesion and ambient cross-linking in latexes when paired with adipic acid dihydrazide (ADH).
ACMO: ACMO (Acryloylmorpholine): hydrophilic, low-toxicity monomer for UV-cured inks, coatings, hydrogels, and 3D printing resins.
4-HBA: 4-HBA (4-Hydroxybutyl Acrylate): hydroxy-functional acrylate with flexible chain. Improves adhesion and impact strength in automotive coatings.
HPA: HPA (2-Hydroxypropyl Acrylate): hydroxy-functional monomer providing flexibility and reactivity for coatings, adhesives, and sealants.
AMA: AMA (Allyl Methacrylate): dual-functionality monomer with methacrylate and allyl groups for staged polymerization in dental and optical polymers.
EHMA: EHMA (2-Ethylhexyl Methacrylate): lowers Tg and improves flexibility and water resistance in pressure-sensitive adhesives, coatings, and sealants.
SMA: SMA (Stearyl Methacrylate): long-chain wax-like monomer for extreme hydrophobicity and as a pour point depressant in lubricants.
t-BMA: t-BMA (t-Butyl Methacrylate): bulky monomer providing hardness, hydrolytic stability, and chemical resistance in specialty and dental resins.
CHMA: CHMA (Cyclohexyl Methacrylate): cycloaliphatic monomer for high hardness, weatherability, and high Tg in hard coatings and optical plastics.
BZMA: BZMA (Benzyl Methacrylate): aromatic methacrylate for high refractive index, hardness, and chemical resistance in optical resins and coatings.
HPMA: HPMA (2-Hydroxypropyl Methacrylate): hydroxy-functional monomer providing a flexible backbone and cross-linking site for coatings and adhesives.
4-HBMA: 4-HBMA (4-Hydroxybutyl Methacrylate): hydroxy-functional monomer with C4 spacer. Improves flexibility and impact strength of coatings and adhesives.
GMA: GMA (Glycidyl Methacrylate): dual-functionality monomer with methacrylate and epoxy groups for powder coatings, adhesives, and hydrogels.
THFMA: THFMA (Tetrahydrofurfuryl Methacrylate): cyclic ether methacrylate for excellent adhesion to plastics and metals in specialty UV-cured resins.
PEMA: PEMA (Phenoxyethyl Methacrylate): aromatic methacrylate balancing adhesion, flexibility, and moderate Tg in specialty formulations.
3FMA: 3FMA: fluorinated methacrylate for low surface energy, hydrophobic, oleophobic polymers. Ideal for anti-graffiti and low refractive index coatings.
MPEGMA: MPEGMA (Methoxy PEG Methacrylate): hydrophilic monomer for water solubility, comb-like polymers, and concrete superplasticizer dispersants.
DEGDMA: DEGDMA (Diethylene Glycol Dimethacrylate): flexible difunctional cross-linker balancing hardness and flexibility in adhesives and dental composites.
TEGDMA: TEGDMA (Triethylene Glycol Dimethacrylate): flexible cross-linker lowering polymerization shrinkage. Standard reactive diluent in dental resins.
PEGDM: PEGDM (PEG Dimethacrylate): hydrophilic, flexible cross-linker for highly absorbent biocompatible hydrogels, drug delivery, and soft contact lenses.
1,3-BGDMA: 1,3-BGDMA (1,3-Butanediol Dimethacrylate): difunctional cross-linking monomer for high-performance dental composites and medical adhesives.
1,4-BGDMA: 1,4-BGDMA (1,4-Butanediol Dimethacrylate): cross-linker balancing hardness, toughness, and flexibility in adhesives and engineering plastics.
1,6-HDDMA: 1,6-HDDMA (1,6-Hexanediol Dimethacrylate): flexible cross-linker reducing viscosity and improving impact resistance in coatings and inks.
GDMA: GDMA (Glycerol Dimethacrylate): hydroxy-functional cross-linker promoting adhesion in dental adhesives and specialty coatings.
PETMA: PETMA (Pentaerythritol Trimethacrylate): multi-functional methacrylate for high hardness and abrasion resistance in coatings and dental sealants.
PETTMA: PETTMA (Pentaerythritol Tetramethacrylate): highly functional cross-linker for maximum hardness, scratch, and chemical resistance in hard coatings.
DPHA: DPHA (Dipentaerythritol Hexaacrylate): highly functional acrylate for extremely fast UV cure, maximum hardness, and scratch resistance.
BPFL: BPFL: rigid 'cardo' bisphenol for polymers with high Tg, high refractive index, and exceptional optical clarity and thermal stability.
PACS: PACS (p-Acetoxystyrene): protected vinyl monomer for poly(p-hydroxystyrene), a critical polymer binder in advanced microelectronics photoresists.
BCF: BCF: methyl-substituted BPFL derivative modifying solubility and reactivity in high-Tg polyesters and polycarbonates. Excellent thermal stability.
DHDE: DHDE: flexible bisphenol monomer with ether linkage for specialty polyimides, polyamides, and epoxy resins requiring improved flexibility.
J-DPP: J-DPP: DCPD-modified phenolic resin with low moisture absorption and low Dk. Ideal for semiconductor encapsulants and copper-clad laminates.
SPI: SPI: bisphenol with rigid non-planar spiro core for polymers with very high Tg, excellent dimensional stability, and high gas permeability.
H-BPA: H-BPA (Hydrogenated Bisphenol A): improves weatherability and UV stability of epoxy and polyester resins for durable outdoor coatings.
H-APP: H-APP: rigid aromatic diamine monomer with biphenyl core for high-performance polyimides with excellent thermal stability and high Tg.
DMEU: DMEU: high-boiling aprotic polar solvent for chemical reactions. Also used as catalyst and additive in polyurethane formulations.
Recycled MMA: Recycled MMA: sustainable Methyl Methacrylate monomer for polymer synthesis, coatings, and casting resins. Cost-effective alternative to virgin MMA.
